name: Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-v2-FC
description: This model is a fine-tuned version of [meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct) on the [argilla-warehouse/apigen-smollm-trl-FC](https://huggingface.co/datasets/argilla-warehouse/apigen-smollm-trl-FC) dataset. It has been trained using [TRL](https://github.com/huggingface/trl).
tagline: This model is a fine-tuned version of [meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct) on the [argilla-warehouse/apigen-smollm-trl-FC](https://huggingface.co/datasets/argilla-warehouse/apigen-smollm-trl-FC) dataset.
